name: OVO Indonesian Digital Wallet and Payment API
what_it_does: OVO Indonesian digital wallet and payment REST API for Indonesian merchants and e-commerce platforms to accept OVO wallet payments, process loyalty points, and integrate QRIS QR code payments — enabling OVO wallet checkout, points redemption, cash-in/cash-out, and merchant settlement through OVO's digital payment platform backed by Grab and PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi (Emtek) with 100M+ registered users across Indonesia. Enables AI agents to manage OVO wallet payment for Indonesian checkout automation, handle QRIS QR for OVO interoperable payment automation, access points redemption for loyalty program integration automation, retrieve transaction status for payment verification automation, manage refund for payment reversal automation, handle merchant settlement for disbursement automation, access webhook for payment event notification automation, retrieve balance inquiry for wallet status automation, manage payment link for URL-based checkout automation, and integrate OVO with Indonesian e-commerce, retail, and loyalty platforms for digital wallet payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting OVO wallet payments from Indonesian consumers for e-commerce and retail checkout automation agents
Integrating QRIS QR code payments for OVO-compatible merchant payment acceptance automation agents
Processing OVO loyalty points redemption for Indonesian merchant loyalty program automation agents
Receiving OVO merchant settlements for financial reconciliation and disbursement automation agents
not_for: Non-Indonesian markets (OVO is Indonesia-specific digital wallet)
International cross-border remittances (OVO is domestic Indonesian payment wallet)
B2B enterprise procurement payments (OVO is consumer retail wallet)
best_when: An Indonesian merchant, e-commerce platform, or loyalty program wanting AI agents to accept OVO wallet payments, integrate QRIS QR code payments, and process points redemption through OVO's 100M+ user digital payment network.
avoid_when: OJK E-MONEY REGULATION: OVO operates as Bank Indonesia-licensed e-money issuer; automated non-BI-compliant payment implementation creates regulatory violation; automated must comply with Bank Indonesia PBI on e-money and payment system. CONSUMER AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED: OVO wallet payments require consumer to authenticate in OVO app; automated server-side wallet deduction without user action creates payment failure; automated must redirect consumer to OVO app authentication flow. QRIS IS INTEROPERABLE PREFERRED: OVO supports QRIS (national QR standard) for maximum wallet interoperability; automated OVO-proprietary QR only assumption limits acceptance to OVO users; automated should implement QRIS for cross-wallet payment acceptance. GRAB PARTNERSHIP AFFECTS ROADMAP: OVO is backed by Grab; automated completely independent OVO product roadmap assumption may miss Grab-influenced integration opportunities with GrabPay. MERCHANT AGREEMENT REQUIRED: OVO payment integration requires signed merchant agreement; automated open API assumption creates no production access; automated must complete OVO merchant onboarding.

auth.notes: OVO uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Jakarta, Indonesia HQ. Founded 2017 by Karaniya Dharmasaputra. Backed by Grab and PT Elang Mahkota Teknologi (Emtek). Products: Digital wallet, QRIS payments, loyalty points (OVO Points), merchant payments, cash-in/out, insurance, investment. SDKs: None public. Bank Indonesia licensed e-money issuer. 100M+ registered users. QRIS enabled. Competes with GoPay, ShopeePay, and DANA for Indonesian digital wallet market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved merchants; production requires merchant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Merchant discount rate (MDR) per transaction; loyalty points integration fees
pricing.notes: Jakarta ID. Bank Indonesia e-money. Grab + Emtek backed. 100M+ users. MDR per transaction.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: CONSUMER APP AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED: OVO wallet payments require consumer to authenticate and confirm in OVO app via deeplink or redirect; automated server-side payment without consumer action creates payment failure; automated must implement OVO app redirect for consumer authentication

QRIS ENABLES CROSS-WALLET ACCEPTANCE: OVO supports QRIS standard enabling payment from any Indonesian e-wallet; automated OVO-only acceptance assumption limits addressable market; automated should implement QRIS for cross-wallet compatibility

OVO POINTS INTEGRATION IS SEPARATE: OVO loyalty points (OVO Points) integration requires separate merchant configuration; automated automatic points redemption assumption creates missing points integration; automated must configure OVO Points program separately from payment integration

DOCUMENTATION PRIMARILY IN BAHASA INDONESIA: OVO developer documentation is primarily in Bahasa Indonesia; automated English-only assumption creates integration barrier; automated international developers should use translation for OVO documentation

MERCHANT KYB REQUIRED: OVO merchant onboarding requires Indonesian business registration documents (SIUP, NPWP, TDP); automated instant merchant access creates pending_kyb state; automated must complete merchant KYB before production deployment
agent_readiness.security_notes: Indonesian digital wallet. OJK, Bank Indonesia, QRIS. API key. Indonesia. Digital wallet and payment data. Grab + Emtek.

security_score_components.security_notes: Indonesian e-wallet. OJK, Bank Indonesia. API key. Indonesia. Digital wallet and payment data.
